description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body, elongated tail, and a slightly curved, pointed beak. The plumage is predominantly brown with subtle gradients and lighter underparts, while the head features a reddish-brown cap and a pale face. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail is long and straight, extending well beyond the body. The legs are short and tucked beneath the body, with visible claws. The bird's surface appears matte and slightly textured, mimicking the look of real feathers. Its overall form and coloration suggest it is adapted for perching and blending into wooded or urban environments.
description: A medium-sized, brown bird with a long tail, reddish-brown head, and pointed beak, featuring realistic feather texture and subtle color gradients.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, long tail, and slightly curved beak, with the reddish-brown head and brown plumage clearly visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow body, straight tail, and the symmetry of the wings folded against the sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same elongated form, with the beak and head profile visible, and the tail extending outward.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the pointed beak, rounded head, and the subtle color transition from the head to the body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Subtle gradients with solid brown body, reddish-brown cap, and lighter underparts
